step_rationale: Platelet-derived microparticles; markers of platelet activation and procoagulant activity.
mechanism: CD41+ microparticles reflect platelet activation and contribute to thrombin generation and thrombus formation post-plaque rupture.

references.title: Microparticles during long-term follow-up after acute myocardial infarction. Association to atherosclerotic burden and risk of cardiovascular events.
